raw_consumer_statement: I bought XXXX refrigerator and freezer on XX/XX/XXXX by my Amex platinum card amount of {$8300.00} and delivered on XX/XX/XXXX to my house Amex platinum card 's term and conditions state that the platinum card company provide a warranty in case a problem occurs with the product after purchase but Amex cards are avoiding compensation or warranties for this issues I hope for resolution for this issues soon
